examples: He came across the jawbone of a 4.5 million-year-old marsupial.
This marsupial inhabits the deserts of central Australia where the onset of rains and the resulting sudden growth of vegetation are extremely unpredictable.
A University of Muenster team drew up a marsupial family tree based on DNA.
The marsupial managed to escape from Cattle Country in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, over the weekend.
The Tasmanian devil is a little marsupial carnivore and they have a tendency to bite one another in the face.
